metadata.name: PartySmart UNC Map Style
metadata.description: Light map style for the police-facing embedded map. Uses Google's default light colors and only adjusts visibility: hides commercial POIs (retail, lodging, entertainment, service, transit) and transit infrastructure (stations, railways, business corridors) so the red/blue party markers and the #4285F4 search-radius circle remain the dominant visual elements. Food and drink POIs, civic landmarks (schools, parks, government, places of worship, libraries, emergency services), and political/neighborhood labels stay at Google's defaults as orientation aids.
